languages.title: Ulwimi
languages.subtitle: Khetha ulwimi olusetyenzisiweyo kuyo yonke i-app.

phone.label: Inombolo yefowuni
phone.searchCountry: Khangela ilizwe, ikhowudi, okanye isimaphambili sokucofa
phone.invalid: Faka inombolo yefowuni esebenzayo yelizwe elikhethiweyo.

auth.onboardingTagline: Iqabane lokhuseleko lobuqu phakathi kwexesha eliphakathi kwe "Ndilungile" kunye "Ndidinga uncedo."
auth.createSubtitle: Khetha indlela yokungena ukuze ukhusele igrafu yakho yokhuseleko.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Asikwazanga ukugqibezela ukubhalisa. Jonga unxulumano lwakho uze uzame kwakhona.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Sebenzisa intlanganiso yophuhliso lwengingqi. I-Native Google Sign-In isebenza kulwakhiwo lophuhliso.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Bhangqa ngoku okanye uqhubeke kwaye uyongeze kamva.
auth.northStarBody: Ukunxitywa VL01 kunokubangela ukuhamba kokhuseleko ngeempompo kunye nezijekulo ezide zokucinezela.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Iqabane lakho lokhuseleko elinobubele kwimephu nakwiifowuni.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear inokunceda kwimowudi yasekhaya, imowudi yomgcini, imowudi yongxamiseko, iifowuni zokuthethelela, kunye nenkxaso yelizwi.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Isetyenziselwa imephu, iindawo ezinobungozi, ukufika okukhuselekileyo, kunye nomxholo SOS.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving icela indawo ukuze abagcini baqonde apho uncedo lunokufuneka khona. Ungayitshintsha le nto kamva kwizicwangciso.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Izaziso zixhasa ukungena kunye neziganeko ezingxamisekileyo.
permissions.notificationsBody: Sisebenzisa kuphela izaziso zokukhuthaza ukhuseleko, uhlaziyo olungxamisekileyo, kunye nezikhumbuzo ozenzayo.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving usebenzisa indawo yakho kwimephu yokhuseleko, iindawo ezinobungozi, ukwabelana ngokukhawuleza, kunye nomxholo SOS. Ungayitshintsha le nto kamva kwizicwangciso.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ithumela izikhumbuzo zokungena, uhlaziyo olungxamisekileyo, kunye nemiyalelo yokhuseleko oyenzayo. Asisebenzisi izaziso kwiintengiso.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving usebenzisa imakrofoni yakho kuphela xa uqala iqabane AI okanye umnxeba wokhuseleko.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving isebenzisa Bluetooth ukudibanisa ubucwebe NorthStar, ukufunda imeko yonxibelelwano, kunye nokubangela ukuhamba kokhuseleko kwizinto ezinxitywayo.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving usebenzisa ikhamera kuphela xa ukhetha ukuthatha ifoto yeprofayile okanye wabelane ngomfanekiso wokhuseleko.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving igcina oku kuhamba kufumaneka kwiZicwangciso kunye nedeshibhodi.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Khetha ilizwi leqabane eliziva likhuselekile ukuliva.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Ukubeka iliso ngokuthe cwaka kukhuseleko lwemihla ngemihla.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Iimpompo ezintlanu zinokunyuka ziye kwi-SOS kunye ne-guardian alerts.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Yenza isizathu esifanelekileyo sokushiya imeko engathandekiyo.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Qala umnxeba wexesha lokwenyani xa ufuna inkxaso.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Zama ukuhambisa ukhuseleko kwidemo yoxinzelelo olusezantsi.

jewelry.noDevices: Akukho zixhobo NorthStar ezikufutshane ezifunyenweyo okwangoku.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth skena asikwazanga ukuqalisa. Nceda uzame kwakhona.
jewelry.scanFailed: Asikwazanga ukufumana ubucwebe obukufutshane. Khangela Bluetooth, gcina NorthStar usondele, uze uzame kwakhona.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth skena asikwazanga ukuqalisa. Khangela Bluetooth ufikelelo uze uzame kwakhona.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Ukufikelela kwisixhobo esikufutshane kucinyiwe. Vumela ukufikelela Bluetooth kwizicwangciso, emva koko uzame kwakhona.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar kuthathe ixesha elide ukunxibelelana. Yisondeze kwaye uzame kwakhona.
jewelry.connectFailed: Asikwazanga ukunxibelelana NorthStar. Khangela ukuba ihlawuliswe kwaye ikufuphi, emva koko uzame kwakhona.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Gcina NorthStar uhlawuliswe kwaye usondele kule fowuni, emva koko uskena kwakhona.

home.subtitle: Ideshibhodi yeqabane lokhuseleko
home.readyBody: Ilizwi, imephu, ubucwebe, kunye nabagcini zicofa enye kude.

map.title: Imephu yokhuseleko
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go umboniso; Mapbox ibonelela ngesakhiwo sophuhliso.
map.updateFailed: Asikwazanga ukuhlaziya indawo yakho. Nceda uzame kwakhona.
map.notRequested: Ukufikelela kwendawo akucelwanga. Ungayivumela kamva ukusuka kuseto.
map.permissionOff: Ukufikelela kwendawo kucinyiwe. Yenza ukuba kuseto lubeke imephu yokhuseleko kuwe.
map.timeout: Indawo yakho ithatha ixesha elide kunokuba bekulindelwe. Yiya kwenye indawo ngomqondiso ocacileyo uze uzame kwakhona.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Iindawo ezithembekileyo ozigcinayoyo ziza kuvela apha ukufikelela ngokukhawuleza.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.emptyMessage: Qala umnxeba okanye uchwetheze umyalezo xa ulungele.

history.clearMessage: Oku kususa imiyalezo egciniweyo AI neqabane kwesi sixhobo.
history.title: Imbali yengxoxo
history.subtitle: AI imiyalezo engumhlobo egcinwe kwesi sixhobo.
history.emptyMessage: Iincoko zakho zeqabane AI ziya kuvela apha emva komnxeba wakho wokuqala.
history.loadFailed: Asikwazanga ukufaka imbali yengxoxo. Nceda uzame kwakhona.
history.clearFailed: Asikwazanga ukucacisa imbali yengxoxo. Nceda uzame kwakhona.
history.deleteFailed: Asikwazanga ukuyicima loo ngxoxo. Nceda uzame kwakhona.

voices.title: Ukhuseleko lwam lwefowuni
voices.subtitle: Khetha ilizwi elivakalelwa kukuba lilungile ukuliva.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Le sampulu yelizwi ayikwazanga kudlalwa. Nceda uzame kwakhona.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Sebenzisa iimpendulo zamaqabane ezidityanisiweyo xa uthungelwano Hume okanye  baqinisekisiwe bengafumaneki.
settings.privacyBody: Thumela ngaphandle okanye ucime idatha yangaphakathi egcinwe kwesi sixhobo.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Ayikwazi ukuthumela ngaphandle idata yakho ngoku.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Oku kususa inkangeleko yakho, izicwangciso, abafowunelwa abangxamisekileyo, imbali yencoko, izikhumbuzo zemvume, kunye neseshoni yogunyaziso yendawo kwesi sixhobo.

sections.companionSubtitle: Izinto ezinokukhethwa kuzo kwi-Voice kunye nokusetyenziswa ungekho kwi-intanethi
sections.privacySubtitle: Imbali, ukuthumela ngaphandle, ukususwa kunye nomgaqo-nkqubo

settings.updateFailedMessage: Asikwazanga ukusindisa olo khetho. Nceda uzame kwakhona.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Iseshoni yakho isasebenza. Nceda uzame kwakhona.

contacts.title: Abafowunelwa bexesha likaxakeka
contacts.subtitle: Abantu abathembekileyo abafumanekayo ngexesha lokuhamba kokhuseleko.
contacts.name: Igama
contacts.emptyMessage: Yongeza umntu omthembayo ukuze alungele xa ukuhamba kokhuseleko kuyimfuneko.
contacts.removeMessage: Lo mntu akasayi kuphinda abonakale kwindawo yakho yongxamiseko.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Asikwazanga ukugcina olu qhakamshelwano. Jonga iinkcukacha uze uzame kwakhona.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Asikwazanga ukususa olu qhakamshelwano. Nceda uzame kwakhona.

friends.title: Abahlobo
friends.subtitle: Abagcini, izicelo, kunye negrafu engxamisekileyo.
friends.emptyMessage: Abahlobo abathembekileyo kunye nabagcini baya kuvela apha xa bongezwa.

emergency.title: Iimeko ezingxamisekileyo SOS
emergency.subtitle: Yenza kuphela xa ufuna uncedo olukhawulezileyo.
emergency.body: Oku kuya kwazisa ukuhamba kwakho kokhuseleko kunye nokulungiselela abafowunelwa abangxamisekileyo.
emergency.quickShareMessage: I-stub yokwabelana ngendawo ilungile. Qhagamshela indawo yokwabelana ngasemva ukuthumela amakhonkco aphilayo.

capybearTap.title: Capybear cofa
capybearTap.subtitle: Cofa kabini NorthStar yakho ukuze ulahle i-orenji yokhuseleko.
capybearTap.body: Indlela ye-gesture ilungele i-BLE event wiring.

errors.voiceOffline: Ubonakala ungaxhunyiwe kwi-intanethi. Umyalezo wakho uya kuthunyelwa xa uqhagamshela kwakhona.
errors.voiceQueued: Umyalezo ugciniwe. Iya kuthunyelwa xa iqabane lizwi lidibana kwakhona.
errors.microphone: Ukufikelela kwimakrofoni kuyafuneka kwiifowuni zelizwi. Ungayivumela kwiUseto, okanye uchwetheze umyalezo endaweni yoko.
errors.billing: Iqabane lilizwi elikwi-Intanethi alifumaneki okwethutyana. Ungaqhubeka neqabane elingaxhunyiwe kwi-intanethi.
errors.authentication: Iqabane lizwi alikwazanga ukuqinisekisa le seshoni. Phinda ungene okanye usebenzise iqabane elingekho kwi-intanethi okwangoku.
errors.timeout: Umlingane welizwi wathatha ixesha elide ukuphendula. Jonga unxulumano lwakho uze uzame kwakhona.
errors.network: Asikwazanga ukufikelela kwiqabane elizwi. Jonga uxhulumaniso lwakho, zame kwakhona okanye uqhubeke ngaphandle kweintanethi.
errors.genericVoice: Into ethile yaphazamisa umnxeba welizwi. Zama kwakhona, okanye uqhubeke neqabane elingekho kwi-intanethi.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving ufuna ukufikelela kwimakrofoni ukuze ukhuseleko kunye AI neefowuni zeqabane.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving usebenzisa indawo yakho kwimephu yokhuseleko kunye neempawu zokhuseleko ezikufutshane.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving usebenzisa Bluetooth ukudibanisa ubucwebe bakho NorthStar ukhuseleko.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Olu khetho lokungena alufumaneki kolu guqulelo.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Imo yedemo isebenzisa idatha yobuxoki yasekuhlaleni kuphela. Iinkonzo eziqhagamshelweyo aziqinisekiswanga, kwaye le seshoni iyasetwa ngokutsha xa i-app iphinda ilayishwa.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Ikhowudi yokuqinisekisa ayisebenzi okanye iphelelwe lixesha. Cela ikhowudi entsha uze uzame kwakhona.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Zininzi kakhulu iinzame zokungena. Linda umzuzwana, uze uzame kwakhona.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Ukuqinisekisa ukungena kuthathe ixesha elide kakhulu. Jonga uqhagamshelo lwakho uze uzame kwakhona.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Asikwazanga ukufikelela kwinkonzo yokungena. Jonga uqhagamshelo lwakho uze uzame kwakhona.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Iseshoni yakho iphelelwe lixesha. Ngena kwakhona.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Imephu yokhuseleko ayikwazanga ukulayisha. Jonga uqhagamshelo lwakho uze uzame kwakhona.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Indawo ephilayo ayifumaneki. Kuboniswa indawo yakho yokugqibela egciniweyo ukusuka %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Asikwazanga ukwabelana ngendawo yakho. Jonga imvume yendawo uze uzame kwakhona.
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Nantsi indawo yam yokugqibela egciniweyo, erekhodwe ngo-%{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Ufikelelo lwe-Bluetooth lucinyiwe. Luvule kwiiSetingi, uze uzame kwakhona.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: I-Bluetooth icinyiwe. Yivule, uze uzame kwakhona.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Ukubhangqa nge-Bluetooth akufumaneki kwesi sixhobo okanye kolu guqulelo.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Asikwazanga ukufumana i-NorthStar. Yigcine ikufutshane, jonga i-Bluetooth, uze uzame kwakhona.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Akukho zixhobo ze-NorthStar zikufutshane zifunyenweyo. Yigcine ikufutshane uze ukhangele kwakhona.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Asikwazanga ukuqhagamshela kwi-NorthStar. Yigcine itshajiwe kwaye ikufutshane, uze uzame kwakhona.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Asikwazanga ukugcina le ndawo. Zama kwakhona.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Isixhobo sokucofa inombolo sivuliwe; umnxeba awuqinisekiswanga.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Akukho mntu woqhagamshelwano olungxamisekileyo ubekhona; akukho mnxeba wenziweyo.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Isixhobo sokucofa inombolo asikwazanga ukuvuleka; akukho mnxeba wenziweyo.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Umncedisi welizwi akafumaneki ngoku. Zama kwakhona kamva okanye uqhubeke nomncedisi ongaxhunyiwe kwi-intanethi.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.
